headline: Is Advantest’s EPIC Tie-Up Reshaping the Long-Term Investment Case for Applied Materials (AMAT)?
summary: Applied Materials announced that Advantest Corporation has joined its EPIC platform and opened an Innovation Center on Applied’s Silicon Valley R&D campus to jointly link front-end manufacturing with back-end chip and package testing, aiming to speed commercialization of complex AI and high-performance computing semiconductors. This collaboration creates a tightly coupled ecosystem between materials engineering, process control, and device testing that could make Applied’s EPIC Center a...
